acuity: DKA (pH 7.18) — fixed-rate insulin running, hourly monitoring
presentingComplaint: Vomiting and abdominal pain for 24 hours
stickyNote:
'Gastroenteritis' is a LABEL, not a diagnosis — who reviewed the gas?
Weeks of thirst + polyuria + weight loss are in the TRIAGE note. Read it.
Deep sighing breathing = Kussmaul until proven otherwise. VBG: pH? Ketones?
K+ 3.4 — insulin drives K+ into cells. Replace K+ WITH the insulin, recheck at 1h.
Fixed-rate insulin 0.1 units/kg/hr — never parked behind an 'oral fluids trial'.
